accurate.why: All claims are supported by or consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; CRA reference is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is to nullify the D.C. policing reform rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: No amendment to existing federal law.

effective_dates.why: No specific effective date beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the core disapproval provision and its legal effect.

concise.why: Reasonably concise for the content covered.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the D.C. act, its number, the Home Rule Act, and the Senate committee.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
